title: How Senior Engineers Actually Build with AI in 2026 | Build a Full Stack Job Applications Platform
summary: JavaScript Mastery presents JobPilot, a full-stack AI job application platform demonstrating 2026 workflows for shipping production systems with AI agents. The tutorial covers nine context files and five open-source agent skills, integrating InsForge for auth, Browserbase for web scraping, PostHog for analytics, and Adzuna for job discovery.
